feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Deleting Folder not possible
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We have an issue where we can't take ownership of a folder to delete it. The button is inactive for this particular folder. The owner column shows "-". It's quite mysterious. We've already tried with full privileges.

Any ideas on how to resolve this?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Restricting a filter list with another filter - SAC analytics story
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a dimension with a long list of members and a property. When I create an input control for the members, the entire list appears. I want to filter this list based on the property.

I considered adding a second input control to filter by the property. The combination of these filters is applied to the table, but the members list in the input control still shows all members.

Is there a way to code a dependency between these two input controls?

Thank you 

Deb

entry.title: Validation using a matrix table - SAC Analytics Story
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have two dimensions that need to be combined following specific validation rules. Unfortunately, I can't use the validation option on the model.

Instead, I'm using a matrix table where I mark authorized combinations with "1" and unauthorized ones with "0". I'm not sure if this is the best practice, so if you have a better approach, please let me know.

However, with this method, I don't know how to prevent data insertion in the unauthorized combinations. How can I achieve that?

Thanks.

entry.title: Designer is hanging in Excel Addin
entry.content:
Hi,

One of our users suddenly can not refresh tables in excel addin as the designer pane is hanging on sign in .

Image attached.

We tried to clear cache in Excel and optimize some settings --> Didn't help.

Anyone encounter this issue?

Thanks,

Yulia

entry.title: Dynamic Column Header in Table, using SAC + SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

Im currently trying to find a solution that would allow me to dynamically change the column header in SAC table (for example, via scripts). As a datasource im using SAP Datasphere.

I managed to accomplish similiar functionality some time ago using a CDS view with Dynamic Text Label, and then changing its value in SAC using scripts. But I can't find a similiar functionality to Dynamic Text Labels in SAP Datasphere.

I would welcome any ideas or feedback. My only workaround right now is to use a text label that covers the table but this solution cause massive formatting issues for me. 

 

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: SAP BO - e-invoicing implementation across EU member states
entry.content:
Dear SAPpers,

Following the introduction of e-invoicing in various European states, how is SAP moving to implement e-invoicing between member states? Is there anything in place already?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Account input control in combination column & line chart
entry.content: I have made the following chart where is shown current budget, previous budget, forecast and actual. Accounts are restricted accounts. Customer has a requirement that user should be able to change the account in the table, but with restricted accounts it seems to be impossible. If I make the chart as bar or line, then I can use account input control so that user can change the account. Is this possible in Combination column & line chart?

entry.title: Adaptive Column Width is not resizing succesfully in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone
When the end user zooms out of the browser while the report is open, the table columns do not work to cover the entire page. We have a sample report that works the way we want:

As seen in the screenshots above, this report works as desired. However, this does not work in the other report we created:

In the first report, there is only one field in the row. In the column there are Measures. In the other report, there was a Dimension instead of Measure. There was also a table structure for Measure where we selected the Measure corresponding to the filter:

Thinking it might be related to this, I created Calculated Measures and put the Measure field instead of Dimension in the column:

However, this did not yield any results either. Why do yo u think this might be due to? I would be very happy if you could help.

entry.title: Schedule canceled because slots are not available - sac
entry.content:
hello,

Every hour we have three different reports that are scheduled.
a week ago they stopped running ,probably because of last upgrade.
we get the following error:
"Schedule canceled because slots are not available".
Please your advice.

Thanks
Eden.

entry.title: SAC: Dimension attribute referenced in view is not defined: dimension = Customer∞15
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are encountering an issue with a SAC story generated on the Datasphere Analytical Model. Upon opening the SAC story, we receive the following error message.

"Dimension attribute referenced in view is not defined : dimension = Customer∞15, attribute = CUSTOMER∞D15∞T, metadataMappingViewColumn = NULL, view = RL_XXXXX"

Due to this issue, the user cannot view the customer's description; when right-clicking on the customer and selecting 'Display', only the ID is visible with no other options. In the non-production system, the data is visible without any issues, but after transporting all the objects to production, we encounter the aforementioned problem.

Does anyone have any ideas on how to resolve this issue?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Chandrasekhar.

entry.title: Date shown wrong in SAP Analytics Cloud based on SAP Datasphere data model
entry.content:
Hello, 

i have the issue that the date is displayed as YYYY-MM-DD. 

How can I change the display in DD-MM-YYYY in Datasphere?
The field voucher_date is already recognized as date field but the correct format does not work. 

The default date formatting in SAC is already configured in DD-MM-YYYY.


BR

entry.title: New xP&A content & composites performance
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We've just installed all the newest SAP xP&A business content on SAP Analytics Cloud, and notice that a lot of optimized design stories & composites are now being used, with advanced scripting & new navigation menu's.

I wanted to raise a question (or concern) about startup performance of those stories, because each story seems to take +35 seconds to load, and I've been trying this after multiple browser refreshes.

When looking into the "Performance Optimization" function (using ctrl+a) and after further analysis it seems to me that:
- loading the story from url into browser -> adds +- 17 seconds
- loading the initialization script (new NavMenu loading only) -> adds +- 8 seconds
- loading the initialization script (other stuff) -> adds +- 5 seconds

When clicking in the navigation menu, this will open a new story each time, so this will be +35 seconds of front-end waiting time for the users each time they move to the next step/action in their process flow.

My question is: Is this the expected 'optimized' user experience?
And is this considered the 'best practice'? Or did I miss something?

entry.title: Given a date, how to find the nearest Monday using SAC Data Action
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Given a date in integer format, how to find the nearest Monday of it in SAP SAC data action. 

We have a date in interger format in a measure called: "Shipment Date", that will be entered by the planner, and we need to find the nearest Monday after 10 days, that's the max "Delivery by Date".

So, for example, Shipment date is: 05/27/2024,  the delivery date should be calculated as: 06/03/2024, instead of 06/10/2024, as this is the nearest Monday to date: 06/06/2024, when added 10 days to 05/27/2024. 

Thanks,

SP

entry.title: SAC date picker for the last 90 days
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there any way in SAC to set up a date picker filter that always selects the last 90 days from the current date?

We need a date picker for an analysis because the dynamic filter and the lookback do not allow selecting a single date or a specific week in the past.

Thank you!

entry.title: I need to buy SAP Analytics cloud trial base
entry.content: My trial for SAP Analytics cloud ends within 7 days. Anyway to buy it

entry.title: Connection to BW - Hebrew
entry.content:
Connection to BW - Hebrew

I connect the SAC to the BW system using live connection

When i present the data in a story table all the des is not showing good

What can be the reason

entry.title: List of users authorized for reports in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Is there a list in SAC where we can see which users have or do not have authorization on which reports?

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when removing/moving a page
entry.content:
Hi!

 We have a story with some pages.
On the first page there is a table with some dimension in rows, some measures in columns and some filters.
We notice that if we try to remove or move the second page, the table on the other page loses all the filters.
In the page that we want to remove/move there are not objects linked to the table on the other page.
The same happens when removing/moving a blank page.
We use stories in optimized mode with canvas pages.
We encountered the same problem both on existing stories and on new stories.
Can you please help us?
Thanks

#sac #table #table

entry.title: Messages in SAC Handling with BW Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

  I am working with stories in SAC with a live connection to BW/BPC. There are certain parameterized messages in BW that appear when I execute them in SAC. However, in SAC, the red messages stay while the others disappear. In my case, the validation messages are yellow warnings that disappear from the SAC screen after 10 seconds. I would like to know if it is possible to retrieve these messages and save or expose them in some way so that the user can review them without them disappearing. I cannot find any functionality or property to retrieve these messages from the system. Is there any container or functionality I can use to handle the messages?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: How to rename cell Totals - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi to the community,

I would like some help with SAP Analytics Cloud.
Is it possible to:
 - rename the "Totals" cell?
 - hide the total of the "Tonnes" column - value 335.000.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,
